problem.title: ビ太郎のパーティー (Bitaro's Party)

compileResult.message:
./Main.cpp: In function ‘int read()’:
./Main.cpp:12:2: warning: this ‘while’ clause does not guard... [-Wmisleading-indentation]
   12 |  while(ch<='9'&&ch>='0')res=res*10+(ch^48),ch=getchar();return res;
      |  ^~~~~
./Main.cpp:12:57: note: ...this statement, but the latter is misleadingly indented as if it were guarded by the ‘while’
   12 |  while(ch<='9'&&ch>='0')res=res*10+(ch^48),ch=getchar();return res;
      |                                                         ^~~~~~
